title: Disable the "Daily Highlights" emails on Saturday & Sunday
excerpt:
Hi there, 
in my opinion it doesn’t make sense to receive the “Daily Highlights” emails on saturday and sunday. 
Could you please add a feature to disable them? 
Best

posts.author: Paolo (Paolo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

in my opinion it doesn’t make sense to receive the “Daily Highlights” emails on saturday and sunday.

Could you please add a feature to disable them?

Best

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
I cant vote but i support 100% this.
This has to be administrated.

posts.author: JavierB (Javier)
posts.cookedHtml: It seems there is no update with this. I am new to Monday and I am really annoyed every weekend when I try to disconnect from work, I receive Monday notifications. I can’t turn off all notifications in case of emergency, and still is useful for me getting Monday emails during weekdays, but it is just awful during weekends.
